mapper.select: SELECT * FROM levels WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY level_number ASC
SELECT * FROM levels ORDER BY level_number ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_level_records (user_id, level_id, stars_earned, score, total_questions, correct_answers, completion_time, quality_analysis, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{levelId}, #{starsEarned}, #{score}, #{totalQuestions}, #{correctAnswers}, #{completionTime}, #{qualityAnalysis}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_level_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND level_id = #{levelId} ORDER BY stars_earned DESC, score DESC, completed_at ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO levels (level_name, level_number, description, required_goals, unlock_condition, max_stars, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{levelName}, #{levelNumber}, #{description}, #{requiredGoals}, #{unlockCondition}, #{maxStars}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE levels SET level_name = #{levelName}, level_number = #{levelNumber}, description = #{description}, required_goals = #{requiredGoals}, unlock_condition = #{unlockCondition}, max_stars = #{maxStars}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
